task:
/home/user/Documents/terrain.ply is an ASCII PLY with 1000 points forming a terrain heightmap (X,Y in 0..10, Z a smooth function).

Build a 2.5D Delaunay triangulation of the cloud (XY plane or best-fit plane, default options) so the resulting mesh has one vertex per input point. Export the mesh as a PLY at /home/user/Documents/terrain_mesh.ply. Do not export the original cloud. The output must be a mesh with exactly 1000 vertices and at least 1500 triangular faces.
